window_summary: This window tracks the recent oven-sh/bun release stream from v1.2.9 through v1.3.14, capturing incremental updates, contributor acknowledgments, and the transition to the v1.3 series.

chunks.title: Bun v1.2.9
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: oven-sh/bun
Release: Bun v1.2.9
Tag: bun-v1.2.9; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-04-09T06:47:14Z; created_at: 2025-04-09T04:32:19Z
Release notes:
To install Bun v1.2.9
```bash
curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash
# or you can use npm
# npm install -g bun
```
Windows:
```bash
powershell -c "irm bun.sh/install.ps1|iex"
```
To upgrade to Bun v1.2.9:
```bash
bun upgrade
```
### [Read Bun v1.2.9's release notes on Bun's blog](https://bun.sh/blog/bun-v1.2.9)
### Thanks to 13 contributors!
- [@190n](https://github.com/190n)
- [@alii](https://github.com/alii)
- [@cirospaciari](https://github.com/cirospaciari)

- [@pfgithub](https://github.com/pfgithub)
- [@zackradisic](https://github.com/zackradisic)

chunks.title: Bun v1.3.13
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: oven-sh/bun
Release: Bun v1.3.13
Tag: bun-v1.3.13; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-04-20T08:07:57Z; created_at: 2026-04-19T07:07:51Z
Release notes:
To install Bun v1.3.13
```bash
curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash
# or you can use npm
# npm install -g bun
```
Windows:
```bash
powershell -c "irm bun.sh/install.ps1|iex"
```
To upgrade to Bun v1.3.13:
```bash
bun upgrade
```

questions.query_text: In the oven-sh/bun releases, which release note thanks 25 contributors?
Across the oven-sh/bun releases, how does the contributor acknowledgment in Bun v1.3.1 differ from that in Bun v1.3.0?

options.text: Bun v1.3.1 thanks 15 contributors and gives special thanks to Martin Schwarzl of Cloudflare, while Bun v1.3.0 does not list any contributors.
Bun v1.3.1 thanks 10 contributors, while Bun v1.3.0 thanks 5 contributors.
Both releases thank the same number of contributors.

questions.expected_answer: Bun v1.3.1 thanks 15 contributors and gives special thanks to Martin Schwarzl of Cloudflare, while Bun v1.3.0 does not list any contributors.

answer_support.answer_text: thanks 15 contributors, and gives special thanks to Martin Schwarzl of Cloudflare for fuzzing and reporting several bugs
